title: Valid Palindrome
description: Decide whether the input is a palindrome considering only ASCII alphanumeric characters, case-insensitively.
io: stdin is a string consisting of the entire input with a single trailing newline removed; stdout is "true" if the string reads the same forward and backward after removing every character outside [A-Za-z0-9] and lowercasing the rest, otherwise "false". An empty or all-non-alphanumeric string yields "true".

cases.stdin: A man, a plan, a canal: Panama
Was it a car or a cat I saw?
